label: NIH 3D 17 yo Female, Normal Heart - whole-heart preview

license.name: Public Domain / CC0
license.attributionText: 17 yo Female, Normal Heart, NIH 3D entry 3DPX-002636.

segmentation.hasSeptum: visible in source anatomy but not machine-labeled
segmentation.hasValves: visible in source anatomy but not machine-labeled
segmentation.notes: This preview asset is a whole-heart visual reference only. It is not yet mapped to RA/LA/RV/LV chamber labels or the app's educational region ids.

modifications: Bundled the NIH GLB output unchanged.
Created optimized runtime derivative with glTF Transform v4.4.0: weld, then simplify --ratio 0.25 --error 0.01.
Renderer normalizes, centers, scales, and applies a translucent teaching material at runtime.

optimization.notes: Optimized derivative is within the 60k-100k V4 preview range but still lacks chamber labels and region mapping. It is a visual reference only.

redistribution.notes: NIH entry displays Public Domain licensing and links to CC0.

educationalUseNotes: Visual anatomy preview only. The procedural educational mesh remains the simulation source for wavefront, lead, and region overlays.
